description_long: This object consists of a group of potted topiary plants arranged in neat rows, each plant pruned into geometric shapes such as spheres, cubes, and cylinders. The foliage is dense and vibrant green, with some plants adorned with small red flowers or berries, adding a decorative touch. The pots are uniform, round, and appear to be made of a smooth, light-colored material, likely ceramic or concrete. The topiaries vary in height and shape, suggesting a curated collection for ornamental purposes. The overall presentation is formal and symmetrical, suitable for enhancing the aesthetics of urban spaces. The plants are well-maintained, with clean lines and no visible signs of decay or overgrowth.
description: A collection of neatly pruned topiary potted plants in geometric shapes, some with red floral accents, set in uniform round pots.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of topiary plants, highlighting the variety of shapes and the presence of red flowers on some plants.
description_view_1: Rear view emphasizes the uniformity of the pots and the dense green foliage, with less visibility of the red floral accents.
description_view_2: Opposite front view reveals the geometric diversity of the topiaries and the clean, organized layout of the group.
description_view_3: Side view displays the depth of the arrangement and the consistent size and style of the pots, with a clear view of the plant shapes.
